## Testing

## container-k8s Checks

- [ ] I updated `PLAN.md` for newly discovered gaps, or no update is needed.
- [ ] I updated `DESIGN.md` or `STATUS.md` for behavior or compatibility changes, or no update is needed.
- [ ] This pull request is focused on one issue or one coherent change.
- [ ] I used Conventional Commits in commit messages and the pull request title.
- [ ] I removed credentials, tokens, private keys, kubeconfig secrets, personal data, and private registry details from code, tests, logs, and screenshots.
